title: Quiz: Entropy Applications
description: Test your understanding of entropy applications

questions.question: The entanglement entropy of a Bell state is:
questions.explanation: Bell states are maximally entangled qubits with S(A) = 1 bit.

questions.question: The area law states that entropy scales with the volume of a region.
questions.explanation: The area law says entropy scales with the BOUNDARY (surface area), not volume.

questions.question: Landauer's principle relates information erasure to:
questions.explanation: Landauer's principle: erasing 1 bit requires at least k_B T ln 2 energy.

questions.question: In 1D critical systems (CFT), entropy scales as:
questions.explanation: For 1D CFT: S(L) = (c/3) log L, logarithmic scaling with central charge c.
